mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TABLE_ID, COL_KEY, COL_LABEL, COL_TYPE, STATUS, REMARK, COL_SELECT_KEY, MENU_ID, SORT_NUM, COL_SELECT_SOURCE, DATE_FORMAT FROM T_SETTING_AD_SEARCH
MENU_ID = #{menuId} and TABLE_ID = #{tableId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_SETTING_AD_SEARCH( ID, TABLE_ID, COL_KEY, COL_LABEL, COL_TYPE, STATUS, REMARK, COL_SELECT_KEY, MENU_ID, SORT_NUM, COL_SELECT_SOURCE, DATE_FORMAT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{item.id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.colKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.colLabel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.colType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.colSelectKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.menuId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.colSelectSource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dateFormat, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.now} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
